name: Old-Fashioned Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Broiler-fryer, including neck and gizzard
1 large carrot, peeled and cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Heat, covered, for 15 minutes in the microwave oven.
2. Skim any foam from the top. Cover and heat an additional 10 minutes or until chicken is tender. Remove carrots, chicken, celery, and onion. Strain soup through a cheesecloth or strainer. Skim excess fat off the surface and add 2 envelopes instant chicken broth. If desired, add cooked noodles before serving.
